babyDevelopment: The baby may 'drop' (lightening) into your pelvis. The digestive system is ready for breast milk. From next week, your baby is considered 'early term.'
bodyChanges: You may breathe easier if the baby has dropped, but walking might feel awkward (the 'pregnancy waddle'). Your appointments switch to weekly.
tips: Review your birth preferences with your OB
Put the hospital bag in your car
Rest as much as you can

dont: Worry if baby hasn't dropped (especially for subsequent babies)
Let the car stay empty of gas

travelAdvisory.note: Baby could come at any time.

milestoneDescription: Baby engages in the pelvis, making breathing easier but putting pressure on your bladder!
